recommendations.title: The Man with Two Brains
recommendations.overview: A brain surgeon marries a femme fatale, causing his life to turn upside down. Things go more awry when he falls in love with a talking brain.

recommendations.title: Doraemon: New Nobita's Great Demon - Peko and the Exploration Party of Five
recommendations.genres: Family, Animation, Adventure, Fantasy, Comedy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Nobita is followed by a stray dog on his way home and decides to help it find its original owner with the help of Doraemon. They find out that the dog is actually a prince in its homeland in Africa.

recommendations.title: Oh, God!
recommendations.overview: When God appears to an assistant grocery manager as a good natured old man, the Almighty selects him as his messenger for the modern world.

recommendations.title: The Jerk
recommendations.overview: After discovering he's not really black like the rest of his family, likable dimwit Navin Johnson sets off on a hilarious misadventure that takes him from rags to riches and back again. The slaphappy jerk strikes it rich, but life in the fast lane is

recommendations.title: Summer Rental
recommendations.overview: Jack Chester, an overworked air traffic controller, takes his family on vacation to the beach. Things immediately start to go wrong for the Chesters, and steadily get worse. Jack ends up in a feud with a local yachtsman, and has to race him to regain

recommendations.title: A Dog's Journey
recommendations.overview: A dog finds the meaning of his own existence through the lives of the humans he meets.

recommendations.title: Patrick
recommendations.overview: A woman's chaotic life becomes more complicated when she inherits her grandmother's dog.

recommendations.title: Kill Switch
recommendations.overview: A pilot battles to save his family and the planet after an experiment for unlimited energy goes wrong.

recommendations.title: Lassie Come Home
recommendations.overview: 12-year-old Florian and his beloved dog Lassie live in an idyllic village in the German countryside. When Florian's father loses his job, the family have to move into a small apartment where there are no dogs allowed. Lassie is given away to another

recommendations.title: Robot Dreams
recommendations.overview: A lonely dog's friendship with his robot companion takes a sad turn when an unexpected malfunction forces him to abandon Robot at the beach. Will Dog ever meet Robot again?
